{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Request to check eligibility for alumni or professional network discounts based on educational or professional background', 'Offer of alumni or professional network discounts (5–15%) not represented in pricing or plan fields', 'Request for user’s educational or professional history (university or field of study)', 'Mention of bundle or multi-policy discounts not codified as a field (e.g., 10% discount when combining coverages)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "11, ['Provision of multiple insurance plan options with prices and coverage tiers', 'Description of health insurance plans (physical and mental components)', 'Description of property insurance coverage', 'Description of travel insurance coverage', 'Inclusion of adventure travel and medical evacuation features', 'Specification of telemedicine, wellness programs, gym reimbursement, and preventive care', 'Details about concierge services and priority claims (service_features)', 'Description of global coverage and 24/7 support', 'Indication of deductible levels and coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium)', 'Presentation of cost breakdowns and total monthly/annual costs', 'Proposal presentation and availability for confirmation before finalizing bundle options']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Request to check eligibility for alumni or professional network discounts based on educational or professional background', 'Offer of alumni or professional network discounts (5–15%) not represented in pricing or plan fields', 'Request for user’s educational or professional history (university or field of study)', 'Mention of bundle or multi-policy discounts not codified as a field (e.g., 10% discount when combining coverages)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 11, ['Provision of multiple insurance plan options with prices and coverage tiers', 'Description of health insurance plans (physical and mental components)', 'Description of property insurance coverage', 'Description of travel insurance coverage', 'Inclusion of adventure travel and medical evacuation features', 'Specification of telemedicine, wellness programs, gym reimbursement, and preventive care', 'Details about concierge services and priority claims (service_features)', 'Description of global coverage and 24/7 support', 'Indication of deductible levels and coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium)', 'Presentation of cost breakdowns and total monthly/annual costs', 'Proposal presentation and availability for confirmation before finalizing bundle options']
